name: Chutes

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: Chutes states that it does not log, store, or persist the content of API requests or responses.
dataUsage.details: Chutes markets end-to-end encrypted inference and Trusted Execution Environments; it states prompts are encrypted on the client, pass through its API as ciphertext, and are decrypted only inside a hardware-isolated TEE.

notes: Chutes provides a public privacy policy and states it does not log, store, or persist API request/response content. However, no primary-source DPA text, sub-processor list, public SCC statement, headquarters country, or EU residency commitment was located on the provider’s official materials reviewed on 2026-04-11.
